# Build-dep apk packages for the task build image, pinned to exact versions for
# byte-reproducible builds (Alpine has no snapshot service). Regenerated by ./update.sh
# against the pinned base image — do NOT edit by hand.
ca-certificates=20260413-r0
file=5.46-r2
gcc=14.2.0-r4
git=2.47.3-r0
musl-dev=1.2.5-r11
